files.patch:
@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2018, 2023, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2018, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -57,1 +57,5 @@
-        this.u = u.mod(params.getP());
+
+        // RFC 7748 Section 5 requires the MSB of `u` to be zeroed for X25519
+        this.u = (params == XECParameters.X448) ?
+            u.mod(params.getP()) :
+            u.clearBit(255).mod(params.getP());
@@ -75,0 +79,1 @@
+

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2018, 2022, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2018, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -92,1 +92,5 @@
-        ImmutableIntegerModuloP elemU = field.getElement(u);
+
+        ImmutableIntegerModuloP elemU = (params == XECParameters.X448) ?
+            field.getElement(u) :
+            field.getElement(u.clearBit(255));
+
